name: Chicken-Spinach Salad with Bacon
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Spinach, torn into bitesize pieces (about 2 1/2 Cups)
2 cups Broccoli flowerets, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
1 can (8 ounces) Sliced water chestnuts, drained
4 slices Bacon, crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Piquant Dressing by shaking all ingredients in a tightly covered container.
2. Pour the dressing over the chicken.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 15 minutes.
4. Toss the chicken, spinach, broccoli, and water chestnuts together.
5. Sprinkle with bacon and Parmesan cheese (if desired).
6. Serve and enjoy.
Piquant Dressing: Shake all ingredients in a tightly covered container.
